title: Crispy Critical Hits
description: Improves Minecraft’s critical hit sounds by adding deeper bass and a crisp, clean impact, making combat feel more responsive and satisfying without changing the vanilla style.
body: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ # FEATURES: **Improves Minecraft’s critical hit sounds by adding deeper bass and a crisp, clean impact, making combat feel more responsive and satisfying without changing the vanilla style.** ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### My other resource pack: - [Helpful PvP Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/helpful-pvp-pack) - [Helpful Default Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/helpful-default-pack) - [Accurate Cobweb Outline](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/accurate-cobweb-outline) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### Want to support me? You can! Simply join my Discord server (linked above) or follow this resource pack. Both are great ways to stay updated on changes and bug fixes.
